environment.tensorflow_cpu_only_policy: For later TensorFlow commands, set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1 before TensorFlow import unless a separate GPU plan is approved.
environment.dtype: N/A for P0; later algorithm phases use the frozen phase contract.

evidence_contract.question: Are the governance, artifact, non-oracle, and stop-condition rules strong enough to launch a full BF/FilterFlow comparison for bootstrap-OT and LEDH-PFPF-OT across all V2 rows?
evidence_contract.baseline_or_comparator: Governance plans and frozen live-run file contracts only; no implementation is treated as an oracle.
evidence_contract.primary_promotion_criterion: P0 confirms governance, artifacts, no-oracle policy, .localsource/filterflow no-mutation policy, CPU-only TensorFlow policy, student-code exclusion, all phase files, and six-row V2 order.
veto_diagnostics: old deterministic V2 evidence substituted for algorithm comparison
oracle treatment of BayesFilter, FilterFlow, students, TT, dense quadrature, paper tables, or simulated truth
FD used as gradient promotion gate
post-result tolerance, scalar, branch, fixture, OT setting, or gradient knob weakening without reviewed amendment
full-comparison success with unexecuted required row or gradient knob
explanatory_only_diagnostics: count of untracked DPF planning artifacts
not_concluded: TT/SIRT, dense quadrature, paper-table, simulated-truth, GPU, HMC, DSGE, scalability, deployment, or production readiness

commands.label: inspect phase and execution plans
commands.command: sed/rg reads of execution plan, P0 subplan, master program, dirty-file manifest, live gate script, and supervisor script

commands.label: governance check log
commands.command: read-only subplan existence, master phase table, row-order, FilterFlow status/head, root head/status, and protected dirty tracked list capture
commands.mutation_scope: wrote P0-governance-check.log under the run log directory

commands.label: diff hygiene
commands.command: git diff --check -- DPF V2 algorithm full comparison master/live/P0-P8 plan files

commands.label: artifact creation
commands.command: apply_patch add P0 local skeptical audit, JSON, markdown report, result ledger, and command manifest
commands.mutation_scope: allowed P0 docs/plans, experiments/dpf_implementation/reports, and run-log artifacts

next_allowed_action: The live shell supervisor should run the separate read-only reviewer and proceed to P1 only if the P0 review ledger status is PASS_P0_READY_FOR_P1.
